title: Dropdown displaying [object Object] instead of options
symptom: The dropdown shows '[object Object]' instead of the expected text options. The list is either empty or incorrectly formatted.
applies_when: Using a dropdown to display options
Passing an array of objects as options
not_this_if: Using the advanced select element with an array of texts
root_cause: The dropdown expects an array of objects with defined label and value properties. If an array of strings is passed instead, it cannot render the options correctly, leading to the display of '[object Object]'.
fix_steps: Ensure the options passed to the dropdown are in the correct format as an array of objects.
Each object should have properties for label and value, e.g., [{"grade_name":"5 Ano"}, {"grade_name":"6 Ano"}].
If using the advanced select element, ensure the data structure is appropriate.
agent_instruction: Format the options as an array of objects with defined label and value properties for the dropdown.
